latest_version.description: Latest major version number for the skill.

latest_minor_version.description: Latest minor version number for the skill.

source_url.description: URL of the external source the skill was imported from.

commit_sha.description: Source commit SHA for the imported skill.

last_synced_at.description: Time the skill was last synced from its source.

sync_error.description: Human-readable sync failure reason, present only when sync_status is SYNC_FAILED.

owner.description: A lightweight reference to a person, used where a payload merely points at someone.
owner.title: PlatformPersonReference

updated_at.description: Time the skill was last updated.

request_id.description: Platform-generated request ID for support correlation.

400.description: Invalid request (malformed JSON, invalid parameter values, unknown fields).

schema.description: Error response following RFC 9457, extended with `code` and `documentation_url` for machine-readable classification and self-service remediation.

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the error.

status.description: HTTP status code mirrored from the response.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.
detail.example: The provided cursor has expired. Start a new search to get a fresh cursor.

documentation_url.description: Direct URL to documentation for this error code.

request_id.description: Platform-generated request ID for support correlation.

errors.description: Field-level validation problems, one entry per offending field.

items.description: Field-level validation problem for a single offending field.

pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer to the offending field.

detail.example: Must be one of: USER, GLEAN_AI.

items.title: PlatformProblemDetailError

schema.title: PlatformProblemDetail
